# Working title

## Hook (first line)

_Grab attention in the first ~125 characters._

## Caption

_Full caption text. Keep paragraphs short. End with a clear CTA._

**CTA:** _e.g. "Save this for later" / "Link in bio"_

> Save the final, ready-to-paste caption as `<slug>.caption.txt` (plain text, no
> Markdown) next to this file — that's what gets copied into Instagram.

## Hashtags

#example #example #example #example #example

## Assets

- Primary image/video: `assets/YYYY-MM-DD-slug.png`
- Aspect ratio: 4:5 (1080×1350)
- Alt text: _describe the image for accessibility_

## Notes

_Design notes, references, first-comment text, tagged accounts._
